name: Fiendsmith's Tract
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>刻まれし魔の詠聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>デモンスミス・トラクトゥス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Add 1 LIGHT Fiend monster from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 "Fiendsmith" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. You can only use each effect of "Fiendsmith's Tract" once per turn.
eff: Add 1 LIGHT Fiend monster from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 "Fiendsmith" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. You can only use each effect of "Fiendsmith's Tract" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
